name: Bilahari
notes: Janya of Dheerashankarabharanam (29th melakarta); audava-sampoorna raga (5 notes ascending, 7 descending); ārohana S R2 G3 P D2 S, avarohana S N3 D2 P M1 G3 R2 S; evokes joy and auspiciousness; a favourite raga for thillanas; associated with Ariyakudi Ramanuja Iyengar's thillana
